# Staff of Lebethron

> [!tip] 👑 Attachment · Cost: **1** · Leadership

*Item.*

---

Attach to a **_Gondor_** or **_Hobbit_** hero. Restricted.
**Response:** After attached hero exhausts to defend an attack from an enemy with engagement cost higher than your threat, exhaust Staff of Lebethron to discard a shadow card from that enemy.

---

> *"They are made of the fair tree lebethron, beloved of the woodwrights of Gondor..."*
> — Faramir, The Two Towers

**Pack:** [[The Land of Shadow]] #8
